incoming: Hi, I forgot my password and can't log in to my account. Please help.
reply:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out! To reset your password, please click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page, or follow this direct link: [Link].

Let me know if you run into any issues.

Best,
Support Team

incoming: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. This is unacceptable.
reply:
Hi,

I sincerely apologize for the double charge. I've just processed a refund for the extra charge, which should appear on your statement in 3-5 business days. 

We've also added a $10 credit to your account for the inconvenience.

Best regards,
Support Team

incoming: Do you have a dark mode feature? My eyes hurt looking at the bright screen.
reply:
Hello,

Thanks for your feature request! We completely understand the need for a dark mode. Our engineering team is actually working on this right now, and we expect to roll it out in our next major update next month.

Thanks for your patience!

Best,
Support Team

incoming: How do I invite a teammate to my workspace?
reply:
Hi there,

Inviting a teammate is easy! Just go to Settings > Team, and click the 'Invite Member' button in the top right. You can enter their email address there.

Let me know if you need any further assistance.

Best,
Support Team

incoming: Do you integrate with Slack? We'd love to get notifications there.
reply:
Hi there,

Yes, we do! You can set up the Slack integration by navigating to Settings > Integrations > Slack. From there, just click 'Connect' and follow the on-screen instructions to authorize the app.

Let me know if you need help setting it up.

Best,
Support Team

incoming: Are there any discounts available for registered non-profits?
reply:
Hello,

Absolutely! We proudly offer a 50% discount on all our plans for registered non-profits. To get started, please reply to this email with a copy of your 501(c)(3) documentation or equivalent proof of non-profit status, and we'll apply the discount to your account right away.

Best regards,
Support Team

incoming: The CSV export feature is broken. When I click export, nothing happens.
reply:
Hi,

I'm so sorry you're experiencing this issue. Our engineering team is aware of a bug affecting CSV exports on certain browser versions, and they are actively working on a hotfix. In the meantime, as a workaround, you can try using Chrome or Firefox in Incognito mode.

I will update you as soon as this is fully resolved.

Best,
Support Team

incoming: We are growing and need to upgrade from Pro to the Business plan. How do we do that?
reply:
Hi there,

That's great news! To upgrade to the Business plan, the account owner can simply go to Settings > Billing and click on 'Change Plan'. From there, select 'Business Plan' and confirm. The billing will be prorated automatically.

Let us know if you have any questions about the new features!

Best,
Support Team
